column1: Luis Arraez leads the slate with elite consistency, hitting safely in over 77% of games and drawing a favorable home matchup against Tanner Gordon, who allows a steady rate of hits to lefties. Pete Crow-Armstrong also offers reliability atop the order with a strong recent run and the platoon edge, facing a volatile Hunter Greene. Otto Lopez and Michael Harris II are viable alternatives, both benefiting from lineup position and advantageous pitching matchups. Arraez stands out as the most dependable choice for Beat The Streak.
